task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with the target phrases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal window showing the contents of phrases.csv with the column header 'target_phrase' and the 5 specified phrases.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window title shows 'transcription_task.psyexp' or a file manager/terminal shows the file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/transcription_task.psyexp.

task_completion.description: Create a random loop around the trial routine linked to the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In PsychoPy Builder, the Flow panel shows a loop around the 'trial' routine. The loop properties dialog shows 'random' loop type and the conditions file 'phrases.csv' loaded.

task_completion.description: Add a Text component to display the target phrase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'trial' routine contains a Text component. Its properties dialog shows the text set to '$target_phrase'.

task_completion.description: Add an editable TextBox component for user input.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'trial' routine contains a TextBox component. Its properties dialog shows the 'Editable' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Add a mechanism to end the trial when the 'return' key is pressed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'trial' routine contains a Keyboard component. Its properties dialog shows 'return' in the Allowed keys and 'Force end of Routine' is checked (or a Code component implementing this logic).

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PsychoPy Builder interface with components being added visually, rather than a text editor editing the .psyexp file directly.

integrity.description: The agent created the CSV file using a standard editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal command creating the phrases.csv file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely configured the component properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the properties dialogs for the Text, TextBox, Keyboard, and Loop components being opened and filled out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected conditions CSV file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/phrases.csv. The expected experiment file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/transcription_task.psyexp. The target phrases in the CSV must exactly match: 'my watch fell in the water', 'prevailing wind from the east', 'never too rich and never too thin', 'breathing is difficult', and 'i can see the rings on saturn'.
